title: Fargate vs. EC2 vs. Lambda
description: Evaluate the trade-offs between Fargate, EC2, and Lambda for different workload profiles. Analyze the impact of each service on management overhead, scaling granularity, and cost-efficiency.
objectives: Evaluate the trade-offs between Fargate, EC2, and Lambda for different workload profiles.
Analyze the impact of each service on management overhead, scaling granularity, and cost-efficiency.
